description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-image`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-image/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 28 defects — 2 P0, 5 P1, 21 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] 01: `alt` defaults to `''` — every image is silently decorative by default
- [ ] [P0] 02: No `srcset` or `sizes` attribute support

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-image
